progress_summary: v1.3 shipped. Manual deploy ran ahead of the planned 2026-05-11 target: opchain.dev and staging.opchain.dev both serve commit 526a9a2; homepage release pill displays v1.3. All 4 sprints, the 18th skill (release-ops), platform expansion (Django/Rails/Go/Rust), and the 3 new /demo scenarios are live. Hand-off to stack-forge for v1.4 (coverage-as-a-plugin-registry, ADEV-327 parent / ADEV-328 PR 1 first).

progress_table.label: Sprint 3: Platform expansion (Django / Rails / Go / Rust)
Manual deploy: staging eyeball → prod (live at 526a9a2)

key_decisions: Theme: A (Runtime PM-MCP) primary, E (platform expansion) secondary, B (release-ops 18th skill) tertiary.
Hero scenario: ticket→ship→incident→postmortem on a single Linear thread (closes the v1.2 prose-vs-runtime gap visibly).
Three new scenarios match v1.2 cadence: runtime-pm-loop (hero) + release-ops-dogfood + django-render-shipped.
Add 18th skill: release-ops. Sits between git-ops and deploy-ops at release boundaries.
Carry-over from v1.2: Playwright e2e for /changelog + the three v1.2 scenarios; LHCI warn assertions on new pages.
All 18 skill versions bump 1.2.0 → 1.3.0; styleguide badge v1.2.0 → v1.3.0; homepage pill v1.2 → v1.3.
Backwards-compatible release; no flag changes, no auth changes, no platform migration.
user_preferences: Picks options when given clear choices; comfortable with 'go with defaults'.
Prefers sharp scoping questions, then approves big plans in one pass (re-confirmed for v1.3).
Wants a hero scenario per release; comfortable with bigger 4-sprint releases when scope is well-defined.
Manual deploy from wrangler-logged-in laptop is the rule; CI is verification-only.

next_actions: Flip Linear ADEV-306 (and any still-open child tickets) from In Progress → Done — release is live.
Hand off to stack-forge: kick off v1.4 PR 1 (ADEV-328) — pack registry schema + generator + auto-flag wiring + parity validator.
Reconcile other stale checkpoints (git-ops still says last-merge #151; orchestrator dated 2026-05-02).

carry_over_from_v12: playwright e2e for /changelog and v1.2 scenarios
skill_state.depends_on: v1.2 release shipped; .opchain/pm.yaml exists with provider=linear team=ADEV
